mapper.sql: id, parent_id, tree_path, room_num, capacity, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select room.id, room.room_num, room.capacity, building.room_num as buildingNum, room.create_time from dm_room room left join dm_room building on building.id = room.parent_id and building.delflag = 0 and building.parent_id = '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' where room.delflag = 0 and room.parent_id != '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}'
and (room.room_num like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or building.room_num like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%'))
and room.parent_id = #{query.parentId}
order by building.room_num, room.room_num
select room.id, room.parent_id, room.room_num, room.capacity from dm_room room where room.id = #{id} and room.delflag = 0
